---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that research-hub doesn't support today?

(One paragraph — focus on the user goal, not the implementation.)

## Which persona(s) does this affect

- [ ] Researcher (PhD STEM, uses Zotero)
- [ ] Humanities (uses Zotero, quote-heavy)
- [ ] Analyst (industry, no Zotero)
- [ ] Internal KM (lab/company, no Zotero)
- [ ] Maintainer / contributor only

## Proposed solution (optional)

If you have an idea for HOW it could work, describe briefly. Otherwise leave blank — we'll figure out the design together.

## Alternatives you considered

What workarounds did you try? Why didn't they work?

## Extra context

- research-hub version
- Related issues / PRs
- Links to relevant docs (e.g., `docs/personas.md`, `docs/cluster-integrity.md`)
